_comment_backend: Set to 'discord' (default) or 'supervisor' to route worker chat_ask through /ccx:supervisor first. Supervisor mode also requires the 'supervisor' block below; Discord fields stay required because they're the fallback.
_comment_supervisor: Only read when backend === 'supervisor'. autoEscalateAfterSec is the grace period before an unanswered ask auto-forwards to Discord (default 60, clamp 5..3600).
